name: @hojai/ai-tool-submission
description: HOJAI AI tool marketplace submission helper. Takes the @hojai/ai-spec schema + hojai.ai.md content and packages it as a Cursor skill (SKILL.md) + VSCode extension (package.json + SKILL.md).
